text: A clock tower chimes every day at noon. On Monday it chimes 1 time, on Tuesday it chimes 4 times, on Wednesday it chimes 9 times, and on Thursday it chimes 16 times. If this pattern continues, how many total chimes will the clock tower have made from Monday through Saturday?
generatorSolution:
First, identify the pattern. The chimes each day are: 1, 4, 9, 16, ...
These are square numbers: 1², 2², 3², 4², ...

So:
Monday = 1² = 1
Tuesday = 2² = 4
Wednesday = 3² = 9
Thursday = 4² = 16
Friday = 5² = 25
Saturday = 6² = 36

Now find the total from Monday through Saturday:
1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 25 + 36
= 5 + 9 + 16 + 25 + 36
= 14 + 16 + 25 + 36
= 30 + 25 + 36
= 55 + 36
= 91

The answer is 91.
